sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ الْمَحَلِّيَّةُ زِرَاعَةَ أَلْفِ شَجَرَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalna vlada odlučila je posaditi hiljadu novih stabala u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The local government decided to plant a thousand new trees in the city.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ الْخُطْوَةُ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ وَتَقْلِيلِ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj korak ima za cilj poboljšanje kvaliteta zraka i smanjenje zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: This step aims to improve air quality and reduce pollution.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الْمُتَطَوِّعِينَ فِي هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعِ الْبِيئِيِّ الْهَامِّ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi volonteri učestvovali su u ovom važnom ekološkom projektu.
sentences.translationEn: Many volunteers participated in this important environmental project.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ الْخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ الْأَشْجَارَ تُسَاعِدُ فِي خَفْضِ دَرَجَاتِ الْحَرَارَةِ صَيْفاً.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci vjeruju da drveće pomaže u snižavanju ljetnih temperatura.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe that trees help lower temperatures in the summer.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمُبَادَرَةُ هِيَ جُزْءٌ مِنْ خُطَّةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِحِمَايَةِ الْكَوْكَبِ.
sentences.translation: Ova inicijativa je dio velikog plana za zaštitu planete.
sentences.translationEn: This initiative is part of a major plan to protect the planet.
